professional_summary: Commercial and product-oriented professional with more than 13 years of experience across CPaaS, messaging, mobile payments, connectivity, strategic partnerships and account management. Combines enterprise commercial experience with hands-on AI product development using Python, FastAPI, Streamlit, Pydantic, Firebase, Docker and Gemini. Experienced in leading cross-functional initiatives, managing high-value partnerships, improving revenue and cost performance, and translating business requirements into technical workflows.

responsibilities: Manage and expand business with existing partners through upselling and cross-selling omnichannel services.
Manage the complete partner lifecycle from identification and pricing strategy through negotiation, contracting, technical integration, testing and go-live.
Work closely with routing and support teams to deliver tailored services and ensure smooth onboarding.
Manage top-tier customer performance and optimize commercial results.
Act as a business-side product owner supporting improvements to internal tools and reporting.
Provide market intelligence on industry trends, changes and competitor activity.
Represent the company at industry events and trade shows.
achievements: Prepared and won RFPs worth approximately USD 2.2 million in quarterly margin.

responsibilities: Managed strategic negotiations, risk analysis and supplier agreements.
Oversaw approximately 180 wholesale partnerships.
Supported hiring, candidate screening and interviews.
Mentored six members of a newly formed wholesale team.
Managed the sales pipeline and defined pricing strategies.
Designed and implemented a framework for cost-effective management of long-tail providers.
achievements: Negotiated and closed strategic deals valued at approximately USD 40 million.
Supported business growth to more than USD 78 million in annual revenue.
Improved the cost base by 18 percent year over year.

responsibilities: Managed the end-to-end vendor onboarding process from discovery to production and risk management.
Created tailored solutions using commercial, market and technical expertise.
Managed technical setup based on commercial team requirements.
Designed and maintained customer pricing strategies to improve profitability and generate revenue.
Acted as the escalation point for advanced troubleshooting for key customer accounts.
Supported development of a new platform from the technical product-management side.
Created and maintained the master pricing document.
Supported due diligence during the company acquisition process.
achievements: Helped Quiubas become a verified Google messaging partner.
Supported approximately USD 6 million in yearly revenue.
Contributed to the acquisition of Quiubas by Twilio for more than USD 20 million.

professional_experience.job_title: Global Compliance and Global Enablement Specialist
responsibilities: Ensured customer use cases complied with legal and regulatory requirements.
Performed risk-management, content-monitoring and fraud-prevention activities.
Worked with the knowledge-engineering team on an AI tool for blocking phishing.
Worked with product and development teams as a stakeholder for number-leasing functionality.
Managed the enablement pipeline for top-tier customers preparing for go-live.
achievements: Promoted into the role following a team reorganization after only a few months with the company.

professional_experience.job_title: Mobile Payments Partner Onboarding Manager / Sales and Account Manager / Business Development Manager
responsibilities: Managed merchant go-live projects from planning and coordination through closure.
Coordinated technical integration and testing with merchants and internal teams.
Supported sales teams during pre-sales activities.
Managed a knowledge base covering international regulations.
Helped merchants align services with local regulations while balancing compliance and commercial performance.
Mentored five newly onboarded team members.
Identified and developed mobile-payment and cross-selling opportunities.
Negotiated commercial offers and developed pricing strategies.
Prepared RFP responses and worked with legal and finance teams on contracts and billing.
Represented Infobip at events and trade shows.
achievements: Prepared an RFP opportunity worth more than EUR 300,000 in monthly margin.
Helped grow monthly margin from approximately EUR 12,000 to EUR 100,000.

projects.name: Energy Usage Optimizer
projects.description: Home energy optimization platform that combines electricity consumption, solar production and weather data to identify suitable energy-use windows.
responsibilities: Defined product scope, architecture and workflow requirements.
Integrated HomeWizard P1 meter, solar inverter and weather data.
Implemented structured data handling, validation, logging and retry logic.
Deployed the application on a self-hosted Ubuntu server using Docker Compose.
outcomes: Created a working system for collecting and processing household energy data.
Built a reusable backend and scheduler architecture.

responsibilities: Designed the decision workflow and expected structured output.
Defined validation rules and human review steps.

outcomes: Created a reusable structured approach for comparing alternatives and documenting decisions.
